overview: Charleston Regenerative Medicine offers non-surgical regenerative injection therapies, including platelet-rich plasma (PRP) therapy, to treat pain at its source. Services are provided by Francis M. Saldanha, M.D., who has 25+ years of experience in pain management.
highlights: Ultrasound and fluoroscopic guidance for all procedures
targetAudience: Patients with chronic or acute pain from injuries, osteoarthritis, and joint conditions seeking non-surgical treatment.
